mapper.sql: id, order_no, user_id, coupon_id, coupon_name, coupon_price, total_quantity, paid_quantity, send_quantity, used_quantity, total_amount, status, pay_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT status, COUNT(*) as count FROM `order` WHERE user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY status
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `order` (order_no, user_id, coupon_id, coupon_name, coupon_price, total_quantity, paid_quantity, send_quantity, used_quantity, total_amount, status) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{couponId}, #{couponName}, #{couponPrice}, #{totalQuantity}, #{paidQuantity}, #{sendQuantity}, #{usedQuantity}, #{totalAmount}, #{status})
